layer3_inference: Fire Dispatch silence as even minimal positive indicator (Layer 2 assigned -0.7 weighted severity, Layer 3 identified it as uninformative)
rejection_reason: Per LZ-RC-003, absence of evidence is not evidence of absence. Layer 2 initially scored this as a slight positive (-2 pre-audit, reduced to -0.7 post-weighting). Layer 3 correctly challenged this. Layer 4 strips all positive weight — the absence of Fire Dispatch data is uninformative, not positive. Scored at 0.0 in final signal matrix.
